falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme market momentum, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a breakout rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the pattern's historical context (bottom_2022_may_luna), which typically failed to break above key long-term support, proving the current unknown verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 300% above the 14-day average on two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would indicate a fundamental shift in market participation, falsifying the HOLD signal by confirming either a confirmed breakout or a panic-driven crash.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
